leadText: Leer (Japanese: にらみつける Glare) is a non-damaging Normal-type move introduced in Generation I.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generations I to II 1.2 Generation III onwards 1.3 Generation IX 1.3.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Leer decreases the Defense stat of all adjacent opponents by one stage. Generations I to II [ edit | edit source ] In the Generation I and II core series games, when an in-game opponent outside of the Battle Tower uses Leer, the move has a 25% chance to fail. Generation III onwards [ edit | edit source ] Leer can be used as the first move of a Pokémon Contest combination , causing Bite , Faint Attack , Glare , Horn Attack , Scary Face , Scratch , Stomp , and Tackle to score double the normal appeal if used in the next turn. It can also be used to finish a combination, with the user gaining 3 bonus appeal points if Rage or Scary Face was used in the previous turn. If powered up by a Normalium Z into Z-Leer, the user's Attack stat rises one stage. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A Category Status Accuracy 100% Standard Plus Move Power — Cooldown 6s Move wind-up time 30 frames Effect duration 12s 15s Additional effect — — — None

sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad A technique that lowers the target's Defense . Useful against tough, armored Pok é mon . Stad2 A move that lowers the target's Defense . Useful against tough, armored Pok é mon . G S C Reduces the foe's Defense . R S E Colo XD Frightens the foe with a leer to lower Defense . FR LG The foe is given an intimidating look that lowers its Defense stat. D P Pt HG SS PBR The foe is given an intimidating leer with sharp eyes. The target's Defense stat is reduced. B W The opposing team gains an intimidating leer with sharp eyes. The opposing team's Defense stats are reduced. B2 W2 The user gains an intimidating leer with sharp eyes. The opposing team's Defense stats are reduced. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA The user gives opposing Pokémon an intimidating leer that lowers the Defense stat. S V The user gives opposing Pokémon an intimidating leer that lowers their Defense stats. ZA The user frightens targets with an intimidating leer, which lowers their Defense stats for a short time.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Leer's Japanese name can be translated to mean glare , which is the English name of another move .
